channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Ibanez BTB806MS-TGF Bass Workshop 2022 - Present - Transparent Gray Flat — $1,250
item.description:
$1,250 · Very Good · AJ's Unused Gear

Hello,

This is a fabulous bass. It sounds and plays great! I had Sweetwater modify the nut and set the bass up with Dingwall branded strings for F# tuning (low .170 gauge string) prior to shipping. If you would like to keep the bass in this tuning, I can include whatever extra strings I have with the bass.

I also had Sweetwater send me a spare pre-slotted nut from Ibanez for this bass. Since it has a zero fret you could easily swap the nut and play in standard tuning without any potential string movement.

I am letting this one go as I finally modified my 7 strings to have a low F# instead of a high F.

I did play and record with this bass a bit and it does have a fee scrapes and dings here and there (mostly the headstock and near the controls. I did my best to photograph and blemishes).

Everything functions 100% as it should with no issues.

I will ship with the original fitted Ibanez branded case, documentation, and necessary allen wrenches.

Thanks for looking!

item.title: Bassmods Cali 5 Jazz Bass Guitar — $1,999
item.description:
$1,999 · Very Good · BAMonBASS Gear Emporium

USA Bassmods Cali with Delano pickups and the Audere classic preamp. Low action and sounds amazing. Ash body with a walnut top, maple neck, rosewood fretboard.

item.title: Fender American Vintage '58 Precision Bass 2013 - White Blonde ASH super lightweight — $2,095
item.description:
$2,095 · Very Good · Eric's Music Gear Loft

This is a fabulous American Vintage Reissue bass '58 reissue Fender Bass from 2013. Weighs 7.6lbs - plays and sounds great. It is ready to tour the world now. The nitro finish has started to yellow a bit and it comes with all the paperwork, G&G case, case goodies etc that you see in the photos. Amazingly resonant instrument.


In hand details: White Blonde Ash Body, Gloss flash coat lacquer body and neck finish, Large C shaped Maple neck with a 7.25" radius Maple fingerboard and vintage size frets, 34" scale length, 1 3/4" nut width, Fender American Vintage '58 split single coil Precision Bass pickup with the master volume and tone controls, American Vintage bridge with the threaded steel barrel saddles, American Vintage reverse open gear tuners, The neck thickness is .82″ at the first and 1.04″ at the 12th frets, 7.6 pounds, and both of the chrome covers are included. Please look at the photos there is wear. Under the neck plate area there is a tiny bit of paint chipped - see the upclose pic.

item.title: Cordoba Mini II Bass MH E Acoustic Electric Guitar (FIREWORKS26) — $280.47
item.description:
$280.47 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The Mini II Bass is here to expand your horizons and your registers! Based on our popular travel-sized Mini, the Mini II Bass is slightly bigger and features an extended 580mm (22 7/8”) scale length so it tunes perfectly to Standard E. Keep it acoustic and the Mini II Bass's deeper body depth will provide a well-rounded tone; use its Cordoba MB103 pickup to plug it in and you'll be surprised by this portable bass's rich, robust tone. Built with all-mahogany woods, the Mini II Bass MHE's unique voice is mellow, soft and balanced. Strung with nylon core, phosphor-bronze strings, the Mini II Bass feels and sounds more like a full size bass than its miniature bass counterparts. With the Mini II Bass MHE, you'll never have to leave the low-end behind!

Get your Cordoba Mini II Bass MH-E Acoustic-Electric Guitar today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash Direct with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha BB234 4-String Bass Guitar (Rasberry Red) (FIREWORKS26) — $335.67
item.description:
$335.67 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The latest in Yamaha's storied BB series of bass guitars delivers the superb sound and build quality that this series is known for in a smaller body with even better playability. Featuring custom-wound pickups that achieve higher output gain while retaining the classic BB voicing, the new lineup of BB basses are a testament to Yamaha’s commitment to musical excellence. The BB234 Bass features a contoured solid alder body with classic original 1977 BroadBass styling. The 34” scale maple neck features a fast, ultra-comfortable profile and a rosewood fingerboard.

The BB234 Bass is outfitted with Yamaha’s V3 ceramic pickups; with a split single-coil P style pickup, along with a single coil J style pickup in the bridge position. A master tone control and two volume control knobs facilitate versatile sound shaping. A vintage-style bridge efficiently transfers string vibrations to the body for full, rich tone combined with excellent adjustability and road-tested durability. Case not included.

Get your Yamaha BB234 4-String Bass Guitar from Sam Ash Direct today with the security of our 45/60 day return/price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha TRBX304 4-String Bass Guitar (Factory Blue) (FIREWORKS26) — $392.02
item.description:
$392.02 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The TRBX300 is built to enhance your performance with a perfectly balanced, ultra-comfortable solid mahogany body that provides optimum tonal foundation. Performance EQ active circuitry gives instant access to perfectly dialed-in, stage-ready tones, coupled with the expressive control you crave.

Features:

  • Sculpted Body
  • 5-Piece Maple/Mahogany Neck
  • 2 YGD-designed M3 Ceramic Humbucking Pickups
  • 5-Way Performance EQ Tone Circuit
  • Case not included

Get your Yamaha TRBX304 Bass Guitar (Factory Blue) today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha BB235 5 String Electric Bass Guitar Black (FIREWORKS26) — $401.22
item.description:
$401.22 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The latest in Yamaha's storied BB series of bass guitars delivers the superb sound and build quality that this series is known for in a smaller body with even better playability. Featuring custom-wound pickups that achieve higher output gain while retaining the classic BB voicing, the new lineup of BB basses are a testament to Yamaha’s commitment to musical excellence. The BB235 Bass features a contoured solid alder body with classic original 1977 BroadBass styling. The 34” scale maple neck features a fast, ultra-comfortable profile and a rosewood fingerboard.

The BB235 5-String Bass is outfitted with Yamaha’s V3 ceramic pickups; with a split single-coil P style pickup, along with a single coil J style pickup in the bridge position. A master tone control and two volume control knobs facilitate versatile sound shaping. A vintage-style bridge efficiently transfers string vibrations to the body for full, rich tone combined with excellent adjustability and road-tested durability. Case not included.

Get your Yamaha BB235 5-String Bass Guitar from Sam Ash Direct today with the security of our 45/60 day return/price protection policy.

item.description:

The BB235 Bass features a contoured solid alder body with classic original 1977 BroadBass styling. The 34” scale maple neck features a fast, ultra-comfortable profile and a rosewood fingerboard.

The BB235 5-String Bass is outfitted with Yamaha’s V3 ceramic pickups; with a split single-coil P style pickup, along with a single coil J style pickup in the bridge position. A master tone control and two volume control knobs facilitate versatile sound shaping. A vintage-style bridge efficiently transfers string vibrations to the body for full, rich tone combined with excellent adjustability and road-tested durability. Case not included.

item.title: Yamaha BB235 5 String Electric Bass Guitar Raspberry Red (FIREWORKS26) — $401.22
item.description:
$401.22 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The latest in Yamaha's storied BB series of bass guitars delivers the superb sound and build quality that this series is known for in a smaller body with even better playability. Featuring custom-wound pickups that achieve higher output gain while retaining the classic BB voicing, the new lineup of BB basses are a testament to Yamaha’s commitment to musical excellence. The BB235 Bass features a contoured solid alder body with classic original 1977 BroadBass styling. The 34” scale maple neck features a fast, ultra-comfortable profile and a rosewood fingerboard.

The BB235 5-String Bass is outfitted with Yamaha’s V3 ceramic pickups; with a split single-coil P style pickup, along with a single coil J style pickup in the bridge position. A master tone control and two volume control knobs facilitate versatile sound shaping. A vintage-style bridge efficiently transfers string vibrations to the body for full, rich tone combined with excellent adjustability and road-tested durability. Case not included.

item.title: Epiphone Newport Bass (Sunset Yellow) (FIREWORKS26) — $418.47
item.description:
$418.47 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

{{widget type="Magento\Cms\Block\Widget\Block" template="widget/static_block/default.phtml" block_id="2161" type_name="CMS Static Block"}}

item.title: Epiphone Viola Bass Guitar (FIREWORKS26) — $418.47
item.description:
$418.47 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

With a look that instantly recalls the British Invasion and a sound to match, the Epiphone Viola bass is all about "fab". The chambered body is made from laminated maple, with a set in maple neck and rosewood fingerboard. Additional retro-style appointments include: covered tuners, rosewood-based bridge, trapeze tailpiece, and retro-looking volume and tone knobs. That classic rock sound comes from a pair of chrome covered mini humbuckers specially designed for this series. Case not included.

Features:

•  Chambered laminated maple body
•  Set in maple neck
•  Rosewood fingerboard with dot inlays
•  Dual mini humbuckers with chrome covers
•  Vintage style chrome tuners
•  Rosewood based bridge
•  Trapeze tailpiece
•  Fully bound body and headstock
•  Master Tone and 2 Volume knobs
•  30.5" scale
•  1.65" nut width
•  Case not included

Warranty:

Part of the Gibson family of musical instruments, Epiphones are backed by a limited lifetime warranty.

item.title: Epiphone Embassy Bass Graphite Black (FIREWORKS26) — $465.62
item.description:
$465.62 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

Ever since it was first introduced in 1963 the Epiphone Embassy Bass has been a player favorite, and now it's back and better than ever. Featuring an asymmetrical solid mahogany double-cutaway body, a 34" scale mahogany neck capped with an Indian laurel fretboard with 20 medium jumbo frets, a 2 x 2 headstock design for improved balance, and a pair of powerful ProBucker 760 humbucking pickups, along with master volume and tone controls, as well as a pickup blend knob for outstanding tonal versatility.

Features:

  • Embassy Asymmetrical Double Cutaway Mahogany Body w/ Gloss Finish
  • 34" Scale Medium C Mahogany Neck w/ Indian Laurel Fretboard
  • Dual ProBucker Bass 760 Pickups w/ Volume, Blend, & Tone Controls
  • Historic Bass Tune-O-Matic Bridge w/ Historic Claw Tailpiece
  • Die Cast Tuner w/ Clover Buttons
  • Case Not Included

Get your Epiphone Embassy Bass today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Epiphone Embassy Bass Sparkling Burgundy (FIREWORKS26) — $465.62
item.description:
$465.62 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

Ever since it was first introduced in 1963 the Epiphone Embassy Bass has been a player favorite, and now it's back and better than ever. Featuring an asymmetrical solid mahogany double-cutaway body, a 34" scale mahogany neck capped with an Indian laurel fretboard with 20 medium jumbo frets, a 2 x 2 headstock design for improved balance, and a pair of powerful ProBucker 760 humbucking pickups, along with master volume and tone controls, as well as a pickup blend knob for outstanding tonal versatility.

Features:

  • Embassy Asymmetrical Double Cutaway Mahogany Body w/ Gloss Finish
  • 34" Scale Medium C Mahogany Neck w/ Indian Laurel Fretboard
  • Dual ProBucker Bass 760 Pickups w/ Volume, Blend, & Tone Controls
  • Historic Bass Tune-O-Matic Bridge w/ Historic Claw Tailpiece
  • Die Cast Tuner w/ Clover Buttons
  • Case Not Included

Get your Epiphone Embassy Bass today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha TRBX504 Bass Guitar (Brick Burst) (FIREWORKS26) — $559.92
item.description:
$559.92 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The TRBX500 series features controls for master volume, balance, 3-band EQ and an active/passive switch for maximum flexibility. Premium mahogany construction and an ultra-musical active/passive preamp design deliver the flexibility and sheer tonal quality you need to sculpt the perfect sound.

Pickups
YGD-designed H5 pickups are defined by a clean, open tone perfectly matched with the flexibility of the active/passive preamp design. Its quad-polepiece design and Alnico magnets give them the power to drive the active circuit, and the sensitivity and subtlety to capture every nuance in passive mode.

Electronics (Active/Passive Selector, Battery Alert)
Featuring an audiophile-grade active/passive circuit for fine tonal control and extreme flexibility, the advanced design offers a level-matched output whether in passive or active and tone-switching circuitry mode, which seamlessly moves from treble control to master passive tone. High-quality, gold-plated parts are used for key signal chain contacts, providing increased conductivity and reliability, and an LED installed on the back panel gives instant indication of a low battery to prevent sudden power loss during performances.

Neck
Combines a fast, ultra-comfortable profile with 5-piece maple/mahogany, laminated construction for outstanding stability and excellent tone. Precision-fitted, bolt-on neck joint for maximum adjustability and clear, punchy tone. Developed through hundreds of hours of play-testing, the refined neck joint shape perfectly balances strength, vibration transfer and upper-fret access.

Features:

  • Sculpted, Solid Mahogany Body
  • 5-Piece Maple/Mahogany Neck
  • 2 YGD-designed H5 Alnico Humbucking Pickups
  • Active Electronics w/Passive Switch ability
  • Case not included

Get your Yamaha TRBX504 Bass Guitar (Brick Burst) today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha BB434 4-String Bass Guitar (Black) (FIREWORKS26) — $559.92
item.description:
$559.92 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The latest in Yamaha's storied BB series of bass guitars delivers the superb sound and build quality that this series is known for in a smaller body with even better playability. Featuring custom-wound pickups that achieve higher output gain while retaining the classic BB voicing, the new lineup of BB basses are a testament to Yamaha’s commitment to musical excellence. The BB434 Bass features a contoured solid alder body with classic original 1977 BroadBass styling. The bolt-on 34” scale 5-ply maple and mahogany laminated neck delivers a sharp attack, and quick response. This durable construction resists warping and twisting and adds the tight, penetrating character of maple combined with the warmth of mahogany to the instrument’s tone. Yamaha's 6-Bolt Miter Neck Joint holds the neck closer and tighter to the body fusing these two separate components into one. Compared to a conventional bolt-on joint, miter bolting offers more efficient transfer of string vibration throughout the body, for improved sustain and outstanding resonance that brings every note to life.

The BB434 Bass is outfitted with Yamaha’s V5 Alnico pickups; with a split single-coil P style pickup, along with a single coil J style pickup in the bridge position. these pickups are tuned to deliver the classic BB vintage tone, slightly updated to provide a brighter sound that cuts through in live performance situations. A master tone control and two volume control knobs facilitate versatile sound shaping.

The 400 models are equipped with a Vintage Plus Light bridge that incorporates “Diagonal Body Thru Stringing,” in which the strings are angled at the saddle and pass through the instrument to the bridge at a 45º angle, as opposed to the traditional vertical stringing method which places more stress on the strings. Diagonal Body Thru Stringing significantly reduces this stress while transferring string vibration to the body reliably and efficiently. The strings can also be attached to the tail end of the bridge. Light weight tuners offer a better balance and complement the overall feel. Case not included.

Get your Yamaha BB434 4-String Bass Guitar from Sam Ash Direct today with the security of our 45/60 day return/price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha TRBX505 5-String Bass Guitar Brick Burst (FIREWORKS26) — $605.92
item.description:
$605.92 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The Yamaha TRBX505 5-String electric bass is a perfect choice for a variety of bassists, serving up an assortment of tonal possibilities with the quality you've come to expect from Yamaha--all at a price no musician can argue with. The TRBX505 features a sleek mahogany body with beveled edges and a smooth double cutaway design--offered in your choice of three translucent finishes including translucent black, translucent brown and translucent white. The 5-piece maple/mahogany neck is carved into an ultra-comfortable, fast profile and features a 23 5/8" radius rosewood fingerboard to provide you with the ultimate playability up and down the entire neck.

The TRBX505 comes equipped with extremely flexible electronics which incorporate a pair YGD designed H5 pickups and an active/passive preamp. The alnico magnets combined with the quad-polepiece yield enough power to drive the active circuit but are sensitive enough to capture every nuance in the passive mode. To seamlessly shape your tone to perfection, the audiophile-grade active/passive circuit features an active/passive toggle switch, treble, bass and mid controls, a pickup balancer control and a master volume. To avoid losing power in the middle of a performance, the back panel of the TRBX505 comes equipped with a battery alert LED light to warn you when the battery is low.

The TRBX505 5-String boasts black nickel hardware including a set of die-cast tuning machines and a high-mass die-cast bridge providing you with the optimal transfer string vibration and tuning stability, easy adjustability and road-worthy durability. Case not included.

Features:

  • Solid Mahogany Body
  • Bolt-On 5-Piece Maple/Mahogany Neck
  • Rosewood Fingerboard
  • 23 5/8" Radius
  • 34" Scale Length
  • 43mm Nut Width
  • HHB5n (Alnico V) Neck Pickup, HHB5b (Alnico V) Bridge Pickup
  • Master Volume, Pickup Balancer, Bass, Middle, Treble and Active-Passive switch (Battery Alert LED on back)
  • Black Nickel Hardware
  • Die-Cast Tuning Machines
  • Die-Cast Hi-Mass Bridge
  • Case Not Included

Get your Yamaha TRBX505 5-String Bass Guitar from Sam Ash today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Epiphone El Capitan J200 Studio Acoustic Bass Guitar Sunburst (FIREWORKS26) — $651.92
item.description:
$651.92 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

{{widget type="Magento\Cms\Block\Widget\Block" template="widget/static_block/default.phtml" block_id="2173" type_name="CMS Static Block"}}

The new El Capitan J-200 Studio Bass is an outstanding choice for bassists who want an acoustic instrument with undeniable style and great sound, whether playing acoustically or plugged in. Taking its stylistic cues from the legendary SJ-200 (the King of the Flat-tops), it has pearloid crown inlays on its 20-fret Indian laurel fretboard and an iconic Moustache bridge. A solid Sitka spruce top is paired with layered mahogany back and sides for great tone, and the mahogany neck's 30.5" scale length and Medium C profile ensure hours of comfortable play. It also comes equipped with a Fishman Sonitone under-saddle pickup and Sonicore preamp, making it ready for any stage - or studio.

Features:

  • Short-scale bass
  • Layered Mahogany/Sapele J-200 body w/figured maple binding
  • Solid Sitka Spruce top
  • Fishman Sonitone

item.title: LTD B-206SM 6-String Bass (FIREWORKS26) — $651.92
item.description:
$651.92 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

{{widget type="Magento\Cms\Block\Widget\Block" template="widget/static_block/default.phtml" block_id="3610" type_name="CMS Static Block"}}

item.title: Epiphone El Capitan J 200 Studio Acoustic Bass Guitar Natural (FIREWORKS26) — $651.92
item.description:
$651.92 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

{{widget type="Magento\Cms\Block\Widget\Block" template="widget/static_block/default.phtml" block_id="2173" type_name="CMS Static Block"}}

The new El Capitan J-200 Studio Bass is an outstanding choice for bassists who want an acoustic instrument with undeniable style and great sound, whether playing acoustically or plugged in. Taking its stylistic cues from the legendary SJ-200 (the King of the Flattops), it has pearloid crown inlays on its 20-fret Indian laurel fretboard and an iconic Moustache bridge. A solid Sitka spruce top is paired with layered mahogany back and sides for great tone, and the mahogany neck's 30.5" scale length and Medium C profile ensure hours of comfortable play. It also comes equipped with a Fishman Soniton under-saddle pickup and Sonicore preamp, making it ready for any stage - or studio.

Features:

  • Short-scale bass
  • Layered Mahogany/Sapele J-200 body w/figured maple binding
  • Solid Sitka Spruce top
  • Fishman Sonitone

item.title: Yamaha TRBX604 4-String Flamed Maple Bass Guitar, Indigo Blue (FIREWORKS26) — $680.67
item.description:
$680.67 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The TRBX600 blends advanced design, precision engineering, and time-honored craftsmanship to deliver a bass that excels in comfort, tone, style, and road-ready durability. Its 3D-sculpted alder body with a flame maple top provides balanced resonance and striking visual appeal, while the slim, fast neck ensures effortless playability. A 3-band EQ with active/passive switching gives players versatile tonal control, making the TRBX600 a perfectly balanced performance bass built for serious musicians.

  • Advanced Design & Craftsmanship: The TRBX600 combines advanced design, precision engineering, and time-honored craftsmanship to deliver exceptional comfort, tone, style, and road-ready durability.

  • 3D Sculpted Body: A sculpted alder/maple-laminated body with a mass-optimized 3D design provides the ideal balance of tone, comfort, and perfectly distributed weight.

  • 5-Piece Neck Construction: The TRBX neck features an ultra-comfortable profile with 5-piece maple/mahogany laminated construction for superior stability and enhanced tone.

  • YGD H5 Pickups: Quad-pole piece design with Alnico magnets produces a clean, open tone with the power to drive the active circuit while capturing every nuance in passive mode.

  • Active/Passive Electronics: An audiophile-grade active/passive circuit delivers precise tonal control and exceptional flexibility for a wide range of playing styles.

  • Case not included but sold separately

item.title: Michael Kelly Dragonfly 4 Acoustic Electric Bass (FIREWORKS26) — $717.47
item.description:
$717.47 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The Michael Kelly Dragonfly 4 is an acoustic-electric bass with all the fixings and trimmings! Not only does it sound great, but it looks great too! Although it sounds wonderful, with the help of the <span style='font-weight:bold;'>beautiful inlay work</span> and <span style='font-weight:bold;'>gorgeous quilted maple top</span>, you'll stand out before the gig has even started! With <span style='font-weight:bold;'>Fishman's electronic system</span>, you'll get even more power and quality out of your bass than ever before!<br/><br/><span style='font-weight:bold;'>Stunning Inlay That Stands Out</span><br/>Before you've plucked a string, you'll notice on the fretboard the beautiful and intricate inlay work starting from the headstock, making its way all the way down to the soundhole. The beautiful shimmering look is thanks to a combination of abalone and pearl to make it sparkle when the light hits it just right!<br/><br/><span style='font-weight:bold;'>Gorgeous Quilt Top</span><br/>Using wonderful quilted maple, the top of the instrument looks like crushed velvet making your bass stand out at your next acoustic gig, perhaps even taking attention away from the guitarist! Beauty aside, the strong maple wood being used helps give your a nice, loud attack with every note you hit.<br/><br/><span style='font-weight:bold;'>Fantastic Fishman Electronics</span><br/>Acoustically, you'll sound stellar. However, if you want your sound to reach thousands, you'll have no problem with the help of state-of-the-art electronics by Fishman! Underneath the bridge, you have a Fishman® Sonicore™ Under Saddle transducer that can be controlled and EQ'ed with the help of the Fishman® Presys + Bass™ control panel on the side of the instrument.<br/><br/><span style='font-weight:bold;'>Features:</span><br/><ul><li>Side Soundport</li><li>Fishman® Presys + Bass™</li><li>Fishman® Sonicore™ Under Saddle transducer</li><li>Zero-End Pin Bridge for easy string changes</li><li>Case Not Included</li><br/></ul><span style='font-weight:bold;'>Get your Michael Kelly Dragonfly 4 Acoustic-Electric Bass today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash Direct with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.</span>

item.title: Yamaha TRBX600 Series TRBX604FM Bass Guitar Dark Red Burst (FIREWORKS26) — $680.67
item.description:
$680.67 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

TRBX600 models combine advanced design, precision engineering, and time-honored craftsmanship to create a bass that doesn't compromise on comfort, tone, style, or road-ready durability. The 3-D sculpted alder body and flamed maple top, slim neck, black chrome hardware, LED Battery-Alert, and 3-band EQ with active/passive switching make it a perfectly balanced performance bass for serious players.

Flamed Maple Top
The flamed maple top creates incredible tone with an elegant visual flare. Combined with the solid alder body, this wood selection helps give a balanced and full tone for any style of player.

Black Chrome Hardware
Elegant black chrome hardware helps give an excellent performance combined with outstanding visual appeal.

LED Battery-Alert
The LED battery-alert feature informs you when the battery life in your bass is about to end, so you have ample time to recharge or replace the battery, and don't run out of energy mid-performance.

Features:

  • 34" Scale Length is the Standard for Professional Basses
  • Solid Alder Body Gives a Full-Bodied Sound w/ Beefy Mids & Excellent Lows
  • Flamed Maple Top w/ Matching Flamed Maple Headstock
  • 5-Piece Maple/Mahogany Neck Provides Durability & Prevents Warping
  • 1.5" Nut Width Makes for a Comfortable Playing Experience
  • Rosewood Fingerboard Produces a Warm Sound to Tame Harsh High End
  • 24 Fret Neck for a Full 2 Octave Range
  • Die-Cast Chrome Tuners for Smooth & Consistent Tuning
  • 2 H5 Alnico Humbucking Pickups Designed by YGD, Offer a Clean, Open Tone
  • Active Electronics (Bass, Mid, Treble, Boost/Cut) w/ Active/Passive Switching
  • LED Battery-Alert Light on Back Plate Signals When 9V Battery is Low
  • Solid Brass Bridge adds Mass for Improved Sustain
  • Black Nickel Hardware
  • Case Not Included

Get your Yamaha TRBX600 Series TRBX604FM Bass Guitar today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha TRBX600 Series TRBX604FM Bass Guitar Matte Amber (FIREWORKS26) — $680.67
item.description:
$680.67 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

TRBX600 models combine advanced design, precision engineering, and time-honored craftsmanship to create a bass that doesn't compromise on comfort, tone, style, or road-ready durability. The 3-D sculpted alder body and flamed maple top, slim neck, black chrome hardware, LED Battery-Alert, and 3-band EQ with active/passive switching make it a perfectly balanced performance bass for serious players.

Flamed Maple Top
The flamed maple top creates incredible tone with an elegant visual flare. Combined with the solid alder body, this wood selection helps give a balanced and full tone for any style of player.

Black Chrome Hardware
Elegant black chrome hardware helps give an excellent performance combined with outstanding visual appeal.

LED Battery-Alert
The LED battery-alert feature informs you when the battery life in your bass is about to end, so you have ample time to recharge or replace the battery, and don't run out of energy mid-performance.

Features:

  • 34" Scale Length is the Standard for Professional Basses
  • Solid Alder Body Gives a Full-Bodied Sound w/ Beefy Mids & Excellent Lows
  • Flamed Maple Top w/ Matching Flamed Maple Headstock
  • 5-Piece Maple/Mahogany Neck Provides Durability & Prevents Warping
  • 1.5" Nut Width Makes for a Comfortable Playing Experience
  • Rosewood Fingerboard Produces a Warm Sound to Tame Harsh High End
  • 24 Fret Neck for a Full 2 Octave Range
  • Die-Cast Chrome Tuners for Smooth & Consistent Tuning
  • 2 H5 Alnico Humbucking Pickups Designed by YGD, Offer a Clean, Open Tone
  • Active Electronics (Bass, Mid, Treble, Boost/Cut) w/ Active/Passive Switching
  • LED Battery-Alert Light on Back Plate Signals When 9V Battery is Low
  • Solid Brass Bridge adds Mass for Improved Sustain
  • Black Nickel Hardware
  • Case Not Included

Get your Yamaha TRBX600 Series TRBX604FM Bass Guitar today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha TRBX604 4-String Flamed Maple Bass Guitar, Caramel Brown (FIREWORKS26) — $680.67
item.description:
$680.67 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The TRBX600 blends advanced design, precision engineering, and time-honored craftsmanship to deliver a bass that excels in comfort, tone, style, and road-ready durability. Its 3D-sculpted alder body with a flame maple top provides balanced resonance and striking visual appeal, while the slim, fast neck ensures effortless playability. A 3-band EQ with active/passive switching gives players versatile tonal control, making the TRBX600 a perfectly balanced performance bass built for serious musicians.

  • Advanced Design & Craftsmanship: The TRBX600 combines advanced design, precision engineering, and time-honored craftsmanship to deliver exceptional comfort, tone, style, and road-ready durability.

  • 3D Sculpted Body: A sculpted alder/maple-laminated body with a mass-optimized 3D design provides the ideal balance of tone, comfort, and perfectly distributed weight.

  • 5-Piece Neck Construction: The TRBX neck features an ultra-comfortable profile with 5-piece maple/mahogany laminated construction for superior stability and enhanced tone.

  • YGD H5 Pickups: Quad-pole piece design with Alnico magnets produces a clean, open tone with the power to drive the active circuit while capturing every nuance in passive mode.

  • Active/Passive Electronics: An audiophile-grade active/passive circuit delivers precise tonal control and exceptional flexibility for a wide range of playing styles.

  • Case not included but sold separately

item.title: Yamaha TRBX600 Series TRBX605FM 5-String Bass Guitar Matte Amber (FIREWORKS26) — $726.67
item.description:
$726.67 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

TRBX600 models combine advanced design, precision engineering, and time-honored craftsmanship to create a bass that doesn't compromise on comfort, tone, style, or road-ready durability. The 3-D sculpted alder body and flamed maple top, slim neck, black chrome hardware, LED Battery-Alert, and 3-band EQ with active/passive switching make it a perfectly balanced performance bass for serious players.

Flamed Maple Top
The flamed maple top creates incredible tone with an elegant visual flare. Combined with the solid alder body, this wood selection helps give a balanced and full tone for any style of player.

Black Chrome Hardware
Elegant black chrome hardware helps give an excellent performance combined with outstanding visual appeal.

LED Battery-Alert
The LED battery-alert feature informs you when the battery life in your bass is about to end, so you have ample time to recharge or replace the battery, and don't run out of energy mid-performance.

Features:

  • 34" Scale Length is the Standard for Professional Basses
  • Solid Alder Body Gives a Full-Bodied Sound w/ Beefy Mids & Excellent Lows
  • Flamed Maple Top w/ Matching Flamed Maple Headstock
  • 5-Piece Maple/Mahogany Neck Provides Durability & Prevents Warping
  • 1.69" Nut Width Makes for a Comfortable Playing Experience
  • Rosewood Fingerboard Produces a Warm Sound to Tame Harsh High End
  • 24 Fret Neck for a Full 2 Octave Range
  • Die-Cast Chrome Tuners for Smooth & Consistent Tuning
  • 2 H5 Alnico Humbucking Pickups Designed by YGD, Offer a Clean, Open Tone
  • Active Electronics (Bass, Mid, Treble, Boost/Cut) w/ Active/Passive Switching
  • LED Battery-Alert Light on Back Plate Signals When 9V Battery is Low
  • Solid Brass Bridge adds Mass for Improved Sustain
  • Black Nickel Hardware
  • Case Not Included

Get your Yamaha TRBX600 Series TRBX605FM 5-String Bass Guitar today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha TRBX605 5-String Flamed Maple Bass Guitar, Caramel Brown (FIREWORKS26) — $726.67
item.description:
$726.67 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

Yamaha TRBX Series Bass Guitars

The bass is the foundation of your music—the groove, the power, the connection that holds it all together. You need an instrument built to deliver strength, clarity, and the freedom to create. A bass where every detail is exactly right: sound, feel, and style working together without compromise. This is TRBX.

Developed by the experts at Yamaha, the TRBX Series combines advanced design, precision engineering, and time-honored craftsmanship to create a bass built for players who demand more. It delivers the powerful tone you need to anchor your sound, along with the flexibility to shape and define your own voice.

Designed for modern performance, TRBX basses offer exceptional comfort, fast playability, and road-ready durability you can rely on night after night, session after session. The result is a bass built to be the true core of your music.

   

Yamaha TRBX600 Series Bass

The TRBX600 combines advanced design, precision engineering, and time-honored craftsmanship to deliver a bass that excels in comfort, tone, style, and road-ready durability.

Its 3D-sculpted alder body with a striking flame maple top provides balanced weight and a premium look, while the slim, fast neck ensures effortless playability. A powerful 3-band EQ with active/passive switching offers exceptional tonal control and reliability in any performance situation.

The result is a perfectly balanced, professional-grade bass built for serious players who demand versatility and performance on every stage.

  • Premium Design & Craftsmanship – Combines advanced design, precision engineering, and time-honored craftsmanship for a bass that delivers comfort, tone, style, and road-ready durability without compromise.

  • 3D Sculpted Body – Alder body with a maple laminate top features a mass-optimized 3D design for the ideal balance of tone, comfort, and perfectly distributed weight.

  • 5-Piece Laminated Neck – Ultra-comfortable TRBX neck profile with a 5-piece maple/mahogany construction for exceptional stability and enhanced tonal performance.

  • YGD H5 Pickups – Designed by Yamaha Guitar Development, these pickups feature quad-pole pieces and Alnico magnets for a clean, open tone with powerful output and detailed response in both active and passive modes.

  • Active/Passive Electronics – Audiophile-grade circuitry with active/passive switching provides precise tonal shaping and outstanding versatility for any playing style or performance setting.

  • Case not included

item.title: Takamine GB72CE Acoustic Electric Bass Guitar Sunburst (FIREWORKS26) — $746.22
item.description:
$746.22 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

Featuring a solid spruce top and flame maple back and sides, the Takamine GB72CE produces all the volume and robust sound that players expect from a jumbo bass guitar. The slim mahogany neck and 16”-radius bound rosewood fingerboard provide great feel and playability, while the onboard Takamine TK-40B preamp system gives you a built-in tuner, three-band EQ and gain controls, mid-shift control, bass-boost switch and EQ bypass switch for the ultimate in versatility and sound quality.<br/><br/>Other great features include a dovetail neck joint, synthetic bone nut and bridge saddle, rosewood headcap, abalone rosette, pearl dot fingerboard inlays, gold die-cast tuners, and a beautiful gloss finish. Case not included.<br/><br/><span style='font-weight:bold;'>Features:</span><br/><br/><ul><li>Body Finish: Gloss</li><li>Bracing: Quartersawn "X"</li><li>Body Back: Flame Maple</li><li>Body Sides:,Flame Maple</li><li>Body Top: Solid Spruce</li><li>Neck Material: Maple</li><li>Neck Finish: Gloss</li><li>Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)</li><li>Fingerboard: Rosewood</li><li>Fingerboard Radius: 16" (406.4 mm)</li><li>Number of Frets: 21</li><li>String Nut: Synthetic Bone</li><li>Nut Width: 1.77" (45 mm)</li><li>Position Inlays: Pearl Dot</li><li>Special Electronics: TK-40B Preamp with Onboard Chromatic Tuner</li><li>Bridge: Rosewood with Compensated Synthetic Bone Saddle</li><li>Hardware Finish: Gold</li><li>Tuning Machines: Gold Die-Cast</li><li>Case: Not Included</li><br/><br/></ul><span style='font-weight:bold;'> </span><br/>

item.title: Michael Kelly Dragonfly 4 Port Java Ebony Acoustic Electric Bass Guitar (FIREWORKS26) — $792.22
item.description:
$792.22 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The Michael Kelly Dragonfly 4 acoustic bass brings beauty visually and tonally to your professional gig, worship service, or campfire jam. The signature Abalone and Pearl dragonfly inlay is eye-catching and distinctive — you'll reach for it again and again.

The Java Ebony top and body pair with the 34" scale length and bring warmth and body to each song. The Fishman Presys + Bass electronics mean that you can plug in and play in any situation. The Standard C neck profile is comfortable and familiar as soon as you pick it up.

Features:

  • Macasar Ebony Top, Back & Sides
  • Dovetail Construction
  • 34" Scale Standard "C" Mahogany Neck w/ Ovangkol Fingerboard
  • Dragonfly Ablone & Pearloid Inlays
  • Fishman Presys+ Bass w/ Sonicore Pickup & Endpin Jack
  • Ovangkol/MK Zero Pin Bridge & MK Diecast Tuners
  • Case Not Included

Get your Michael Kelly Dragonfly 4 Port Java Ebony Acoustic-Electric Bass Guitar today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Michael Kelly Pinnacle 4 Bass Guitar Grey Black (FIREWORKS26) — $773.82
item.description:
$773.82 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

{{widget type="Magento\Cms\Block\Widget\Block" template="widget/static_block/default.phtml" block_id="4822" type_name="CMS Static Block"}}

item.title: Michael Kelly Pinnacle 4 Bass Guitar (FIREWORKS26) — $773.82
item.description:
$773.82 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The Pinnacle 4 is designed for bass players who demand an eye-catching instrument that delivers an enormous range of sounds. Thoughtful design details created an evenly balanced instrument which feels comfortable whether you play standing or sitting. The deep cut lower horn offers easy access to the upper reaches of the neck. The swamp ash body provides a balanced tone and the ornately-burled poplar top gives the instrument a distinctive look. Maple and walnut are layered to create a rock-solid five-piece neck, and the slim shape inspires confidence while performing. Diamond inlays and glow-in-the-dark side markers add a special touch to the rich ebony fretboard.

<div class="youtube-video-container"><iframe width="560" height="315" src="" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe></div>

The Pinnacle 4 is able to create that perfect tone, whether in a concert performance, recording in the studio, or simply knocking out tunes in rehearsal. Two custom-wound Rockfield MDC4 humbucker pickups provide a modern, fat sound with potent midrange punch. This increased output of the dual coils produces a full, meaty voice that can sing with amazing sustain. Each pickup is equipped with a dedicated coil-split switch. Splitting the pickup coils to single-coil configuration will deliver a more airy, classic tone.

The push-pull Master Volume knob engages the active preamp. In the active mode, the MK Custom 3-band EQ offers simple control shaping of the instrument’s sound. Selecting the passive mode calls up an authentic “old-school” tone. It is this inclusive combination of pickups, coil-splitting, pickup blending, and the active MK 3-band EQ that assure an endless range of signature sounds for each player.

The diecast MCN4 bridge allows individual side-to-side saddle adjustments for variable string spacing by up to 1.5mm to optimize the instrument to your playing preferences. An exposed spoked truss rod wheel at the base of the fingerboard makes any needed adjustments quick and easy.

Features:

  • Swamp Ash Body w/ Poplar Burl Top
  • 34" Scale Standard C 5-Piece Maple & Walnut Neck w/ Ebony Fretboard
  • Diamond Inlays w/ Glow-in-the-Dark Side Markers
  • Dual Action Truss Rod w/ Spoke Wheel at the Base of the Fretboard
  • Two Rockfield MDC4 Pickups
  • Master Volume w/ Push-Pull for Active/Passive Switching, Pickup Balance, Bass, Mid, Treble, 2x Mini Toggle Pickup Coil Split
  • MCN4 Bridge w/ Side-to-Side String Spacing Adjustment
  • Case Not Included

Get your Pinnacle 4 Bass Guitar today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

⚠️ WARNING: This product contains a chemical known to the State of California to cause cancer and reproductive harm - .

item.title: Taylor GS Mini e Koa Acoustic Electric Bass (FIREWORKS26) — $862.37
item.description:
$862.37 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

Taylor's bite-sized four-string acoustic bass has made waves across the music world, and they're bringing tasteful flavors to the line with this edition, made with Hawaiian koa. With the GS Mini-e Bass, players can add punchy, warm acoustic bass sounds to their music, and with Hawaiian koa, the package is more attractive than ever. Specially formulated nylon-core strings make this bite-sized bass a dream to play, and its beefy response makes it a great addition to virtually any musical situation, from ensemble settings to home recording. Complete with a gorgeous finish that draws out koa's natural beauty, this model also ships with a padded gig bag for easy transportation.

Features:

  • GS Mini Layered Koa Body w/ Hawaiian Koa Top
  • 23-1/2" Scale Tropical Mahogany Neck w/ Ebony Fretboard
  • ES-B Pickup/Preamp Combo w/ Built-in Chromatic Tuner
  • D'Addario Bass Nylon-Core Strings
  • Nubone Nut & Micarta Saddle, Die-Cast Chrome Tuners
  • Gig Bag Included

Get your Taylor Guitars GS Mini-e Koa Acoustic-Electric Bass today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Martin 000C Jr E Bass (FIREWORKS26) — $792.22
item.description:
$792.22 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

000C Jr E Bass

The 000C Junior E Bass is your full-scale companion, built to bring rich, resonant low end wherever your music takes you. Whether you're laying down grooves at home, jamming with friends, or taking your music on the road, this compact yet powerful acoustic bass is always ready. A solid spruce top provides clarity and definition, while solid sapele back and sides add warmth, punch, and depth, creating a well-balanced, full-bodied bass tone. Scalloped spruce X-bracing enhances resonance and projection, delivering a big voice in a travel-friendly frame. The 24.9" scale length offers a familiar feel, while the Performing Artist neck profile with a high-performance taper and a cutaway allows smooth movement up and down the fretboard. A gently beveled fingerboard edge makes long sessions feel effortless. And when it’s time to plug in, Martin E1 electronics—with a built-in tuner—let you dial in your tone with precision. Available in natural or burst, the 000C Junior E Bass combines classic Martin craftsmanship with modern versatility. Complete with a durable softshell case, it’s always ready to hit the road—because the best companions don’t just follow the rhythm, they lay the foundation.

Hightlights

  • 000 Junior-14 Fret Cutaway body size
  • Sapele back and sides
  • Spruce top
  • Natural
  • PA Profile with High-Performance Taper
  • Sapele back
  • Softshell case

item.title: Michael Kelly Dragonfly 4 Fretless Acoustic Electric Bass (FIREWORKS26) — $792.22
item.description:
$792.22 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The Michael Kelly Dragonfly Fretless 4 is a beautiful ornate and wonderfully sounding instrument. Featuring an incredible Fishman electronics system, it was built to sound fantastic.  Before you even touch the instrument you can't help but admire all the gorgeous appointments including its quilt maple top, gorgeous rosette and intricate inlay work on the neck.

Incredible Fishman Electronics System
While this bass sounds fantastic acoustically, you'll have the ability to maximize your volume and tone thanks to Fishman's electronics system. The combination of the Fishman Presys + Bass to dial in the volume and EQ of your instrument on top of the Fishman Sonicore Under Saddle transducer bridge pickup to get the subtle nuances of tone (which is incredibly necessary on fretless basses) helps drive your tone louder and clearer than ever before! There's even a bonus tuner built in so you can make sure you're in tune regardless of the circumstance!

Built To Sound Fantastic
The luthiers at Michael Kelly have made a fretless bass that first and foremost sounds great. The combination of a maple body, a mahogany neck and rosewood fretboard gives you a wonderful mix of tone with structural integrity to play your heart out and sound wonderfull while sliding up and down the neck. The tough chrome hardware also helps to make sure you stay in tune!

Gorgeous Appointments
While this instrument sounds great, it should also be noted that it's very easy on the eyes. One small glance and you can't help but notice the gorgeous quilt maple top with a stunning abalone rosette. Don't forget the striking dragonfly inlay that covers the entire length of the neck as you play your tastiest licks!

  • Quilt Maple Top, Back and Sides
  • Rosewood Fretboard featuring Abalone and Pearl Dragonfly Inlay
  • Fishman Presys + Bass Electronics and Fishman Sonicore Under Saddle transducer Bridge Pickup
  • Chrome Hardware

Get your Michael Kelly Dragonfly 4 Fretless Acoustic-Electric Bass today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Martin 000C Jr. Acoustic Electric Bass (FIREWORKS26) — $792.22
item.description:
$792.22 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

000C Jr. Electric Acoustic Bass

The 000C Junior E Bass is your full-scale companion, built to bring rich, resonant low end wherever your music takes you. Whether you're laying down grooves at home, jamming with friends, or taking your music on the road, this compact yet powerful acoustic bass is always ready. A solid spruce top provides clarity and definition, while solid sapele back and sides add warmth, punch, and depth, creating a well-balanced, full-bodied bass tone. Scalloped spruce X-bracing enhances resonance and projection, delivering a big voice in a travel-friendly frame. The 24.9" scale length offers a familiar feel, while the Performing Artist neck profile with a high-performance taper and a cutaway allows smooth movement up and down the fretboard. A gently beveled fingerboard edge makes long sessions feel effortless. And when it’s time to plug in, Martin E1 electronics—with a built-in tuner—let you dial in your tone with precision. Available in natural or burst, the 000C Junior E Bass combines classic Martin craftsmanship with modern versatility. Complete with a durable softshell case, it’s always ready to hit the road—because the best companions don’t just follow the rhythm, they lay the foundation.

item.title: Michael Kelly Pinnacle 5 String Fretless Bass Guitar (FIREWORKS26) — $839.37
item.description:
$839.37 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

Pinnacle 5 String Fretless Bass Guitar

The Pinnacle 5 Fretless is designed for today’s demanding bass player. Thoughtful design details created an evenly balanced instrument which feels comfortable whether you play standing or sitting. The deep cut lower horn offers easy access to the upper reaches of the neck. The swamp ash body provides a balanced tone and the ornately-burled poplar top gives the instrument a distinctive look. Maple and walnut are layered to create a rock-solid five-piece neck, and the slim shape inspires confidence while performing. Glide between notes seamlessly on the fretless fingerboard with diamond inlays and glow-in-the-dark side markers

The Pinnacle 5 is able to create that perfect tone, whether in a concert performance, recording in the studio, or simply knocking out tunes in rehearsal. Two custom-wound Rockfield MDC5 humbucker pickups provide a modern, fat sound with potent midrange punch. This increased output of the dual coils produces a full, meaty voice that can sing with amazing sustain. Each pickup is equipped with a dedicated coil-split switch. Splitting the pickup coils to single-coil configuration will deliver a more airy, classic tone.

The push-pull Master Volume knob engages the active preamp. In the active mode, the MK Custom 3-band EQ offers simple control shaping of the instrument’s sound. Selecting the passive mode calls up an authentic “old-school” tone. It is this inclusive combination of pickups, coil-splitting, pickup blending, and the active MK 3-band EQ that assure an endless range of signature sounds for each player.

The die-cast MCN5 bridge allows individual side-to-side saddle adjustments for variable string spacing by up to 1.5mm to optimize the instrument to your playing preferences. An exposed spoked truss rod wheel at the base of the fingerboard makes any needed adjustments quick and easy.

<div class="youtube-video-container"><iframe width="560" height="315" src=" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe></div>

Main Feature 1 Headline

Delivering a tone that is focused, articulate, and deep, the Prelude Port OM makes you sound great. The great tone is thanks to the right combination of classic guitar building with a touch of tech. The slightly smaller size of the vintage OM body shape is comfortable and contributes to the instrument's focus. Michael Kelly's Port Technology, with its offset soundhole delivers the added projection and bigger tone. Add to that the solid spruce top and special bracing and this guitar delivers on sound.

Main Feature 2 Headline

Delivering a tone that is focused, articulate, and deep, the Prelude Port OM makes you sound great. The great tone is thanks to the right combination of classic guitar building with a touch of tech. The slightly smaller size of the vintage OM body shape is comfortable and contributes to the instrument's focus. Michael Kelly's Port Technology, with its offset soundhole delivers the added projection and bigger tone. Add to that the solid spruce top and special bracing and this guitar delivers on sound.

Main Feature 3 Headline 

With a stable and reliable Floyd Rose Special tremolo system, you can dive-bomb and perform pitch bends with confidence. This locking tremolo ensures your tuning remains intact, even during the most aggressive performances. Experience freedom in your playing without the worry of losing your sound.

Why We Love It

The LTD M-1001 is not just a guitar; it’s a powerful tool for expression. Its striking appearance and exceptional sound quality make it a favorite among players who want to stand out both visually and sonically

Features:

  • Swamp ash body
  • Burled poplar top
  • Maple and walnut neck
  • Rockfield MDC5 humbucker pickups
  • Coil-split circuit
  • Spoked truss rod wheel

item.title: Michael Kelly Pinnacle 5 String Left Handed Bass Guitar (FIREWORKS26) — $839.37
item.description:
$839.37 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

Pinnacle 5 String Left Handed Bass Guitar 

The Michael Kelly Pinnacle 5 5-String Bass in Natural Burl finish delivers striking looks and bold sonic capability tailored for modern bassists and left-handed players alike. Built with a swamp ash body topped with an ornately burled poplar veneer, this bass not only stands out visually but also offers a naturally balanced tonal foundation with strong lows, pronounced midrange, and clear highs. The deep cut of the lower horn provides easy access up the neck, whether you’re standing on stage or sitting in the studio. Its elegant yet rugged design makes it a compelling choice for players who want both aesthetic appeal and stage-ready performance.

<div class="youtube-video-container"><iframe width="560" height="315" src=" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe></div>

Premium Construction for Comfort and Playability

At the heart of the Pinnacle 5 is a 5-piece neck crafted from maple and walnut that gives the instrument strength and stability while adding resonance and sustain. The neck is bolted securely to the body and topped with a rich ebony fretboard featuring 24 medium jumbo frets and diamond inlays with glow-in-the-dark side markers for visibility in low light. A 34-inch scale length provides familiar feel and tension, while the Standard C profile neck supports smooth playability for intricate fingerstyle runs or powerful grooves. The exposed spoke wheel truss rod at the base of the fretboard makes tweaks quick and precise so you stay dialed in as your environment or strings change.

Versatile Electronics for Rich, Modern Sound

The Pinnacle 5’s electronics suite gives players a broad tonal canvas to work with. Two custom-wound Rockfield MDC5 humbucker pickups deliver a fat, punchy voice with strong midrange and impressive sustain. Each pickup features its own coil-split switch, so you can switch from thick dual-coil power to a more airy, single-coil clarity with ease. The push/pull Master Volume knob lets you engage the active preamp or bypass it for classic passive operation, while a 3-band EQ (Bass, Mid, Treble) offers intuitive control over your tone’s character. Together, this advanced configuration lets you dial in anything from warm, rounded lows to articulate slap tones and cutting melodic lines.

Hardware and Performance That Inspires

Completing the Pinnacle 5’s performance profile is the Michael Kelly MCN5 bridge with die-cast construction and adjustable saddles that allow side-to-side string spacing adjustments. The hardware sits confidently on the body, supporting solid tuning stability and reliable intonation whether you’re recording, rehearsing, or performing. Black hardware accents complement the natural burl top, giving the instrument a cohesive visual identity. Whether you’re a left-handed bassist looking for a high-value workhorse or an experienced player looking for expressive versatility, this bass delivers impactful tone, ergonomic comfort, and aesthetic flair in one compelling package.

Why We Love It

Our experts love the Pinnacle 5 for its balanced swamp ash body, eye-catching poplar burl top, and smooth ebony fretboard that feel great and sound powerful in any musical context. The dual Rockfield MDC5 pickups with coil-split and active/passive switching offer wide tonal flexibility from vintage warmth to modern punch. With a strong 3-band EQ, adjustable bridge, and comfortable neck profile, it’s versatile enough for studio, stage, or practice sessions.

Features:

  • Swamp ash body with poplar burl top
  • Left-handed 5-string electric bass design
  • 5-piece maple and walnut neck for strength and resonance
  • Ebony fretboard with 24 medium jumbo frets and diamond inlays
  • Two custom Rockfield MDC5 humbucker pickups
  • Individual coil-split switches for each pickup
  • Push/pull Master Volume for active/passive switching
  • Active 3-band EQ (Bass, Mid, Treble) for tone shaping
  • MCN5 die-cast bridge with adjustable string spacing
  • Exposed spoke wheel truss rod for easy neck adjustment

item.title: Yamaha BB734A Bass Guitar Translucent Matte Black (FIREWORKS26) — $839.37
item.description:
$839.37 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

What always sets Yamaha apart from the rest is the love and care put into their instruments, along with affordability. The Yamaha BB734A bass guitar introduces modern appointments that give it the modern feel it has, which complements its vintage-style appointments. It also uses VSP7 and VSC7 Alnico V split single-coil pickups to give off its versatile sound as well. For bass players who enjoy a vintage look with a modern feel and enjoy playing a wide range of styles, this BB734A bass guitar is perfect for you.

Modern Appointments
Using a variety of wood, this Yamaha BB734A bass uses a 5-piece maple and mahogany bolt-on neck, with an alder and maple body as well. It uses a thinner neck profile than most bass guitars, which gives it much more playability and comfort. The woods used on this bass offer a great punch of character, allowing it to cut through any mix and pack a real strong punch with plenty of sustain.

Vintage-Style Appointments
With the use of vintage-style hardware, this BB734A offers a unique character. While it seems to cater to modern players, it still holds a very classy vibe. For the bridge, it uses a vintage plus steel-plated bridge with brass saddles for convertible stringing.

VSP7 and VSC7 Alnico V Split Single Coil Pickups
This BB734A features extremely versatile pickups, in a style where you have one pickup in the bridge and a split single coil in the neck. The active preamp has a 3-band EQ that will offer so much variety in tone than you already have with just the pickups alone. There is so much experimentation to be done when it comes to utilizing this unique bass.

Features:

  • Alder/Maple/Alder Body Construction
  • 34"-Scale 5-Piece Maple/Mahogany Neck
  • 10"-Radius, 21-Fret Rosewood Fingerboard
  • VSP7n Split Single Coil Alnico V/ VSC7b Single Coil Alnico V Pickups
  • Includes Gig Bag

Get your Yamaha BB734A Bass Guitar today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Michael Kelly Pinnacle 5 5-String Bass Guitar (FIREWORKS26) — $839.37
item.description:
$839.37 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The Pinnacle 5 is designed for today's demanding bass player. Thoughtful design details created an evenly balanced instrument which feels comfortable whether you play standing or sitting. The deep cut lower horn offers easy access to the upper reaches of the neck. The swamp ash body provides a balanced tone and the ornately-burled poplar top gives the instrument a distinctive look. Maple and walnut are layered to create a rock-solid five-piece neck, and the slim shape inspires confidence while performing. Diamond inlays and glow-in-the-dark side markers add a special touch to the rich ebony fretboard.

<div class="youtube-video-container"><iframe width="560" height="315" src="" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe></div>

The Pinnacle 5 is able to create that perfect tone, whether in a concert performance, recording in the studio, or simply knocking out tunes in rehearsal. Two custom-wound Rockfield MDC5 humbucker pickups provide a modern, fat sound with potent midrange punch. This increased output of the dual coils produces a full, meaty voice that can sing with amazing sustain. Each pickup is equipped with a dedicated coil-split switch. Splitting the pickup coils to single-coil configuration will deliver a more airy, classic tone.

The push-pull Master Volume knob engages the active preamp. In the active mode, the MK Custom 3-band EQ offers simple control shaping of the instrument’s sound. Selecting the passive mode calls up an authentic "old-school" tone. It is this inclusive combination of pickups, coil-splitting, pickup blending, and the active MK 3-band EQ that assure an endless range of signature sounds for each player.

The die-cast MCN5 bridge allows individual side-to-side saddle adjustments for variable string spacing by up to 1.5mm to optimize the instrument to your playing preferences. An exposed spoked truss rod wheel at the base of the fingerboard makes any needed adjustments quick and easy.

Features:

  • Swamp Ash Body w/ Poplar Burl Top
  • 34" Scale Standard C 5-Piece Maple & Walnut Neck w/ Ebony Fretboard
  • Diamond Inlays w/ Glow-in-the-Dark Side Markers
  • Dual Action Truss Rod w/ Spoke Wheel at the Base of the Fretboard
  • Two Rockfield MDC5 Pickups
  • MCN5 Bridge w/ Side-to-Side String Spacing Adjustment
  • Case Not Included

Get your Pinnacle 5 5-String Bass Guitar today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

⚠️ WARNING: This product contains a chemical known to the State of California to cause cancer and reproductive harm - .

item.title: Michael Kelly Dragonfly Fretless 5 5 String Acoustic Electric Bass Guitar (FIREWORKS26) — $866.97
item.description:
$866.97 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

The Michael Kelly Dragonfly 5 acoustic bass brings beauty visually and tonally to your professional gig, worship service, or campfire jam. The signature Abalone and Pearl dragonfly inlay is eye-catching and distinctive — you'll reach for it again and again.

The Quilt Maple top and body pair with the 34" scale length and bring warmth and body to each song. The side dots alongside the fretless fingerboard are placed so that they are centered for each fret, and will help ensure you are right where you want to be on every note. The Fishman Presys + Bass electronics mean that you can plug in and play in any situation. The Standard C neck profile is comfortable and familiar as soon as you pick it up.

Features:

  • Quilt Maple Top & Body w/ 6-Ply White-Black Binding
  • Smoke Burst Color
  • Dovetail Construction
  • 34" Scale Standard "C" Shape Mahogany Neck w/ Fretless Pau Ferro Fingerboard
  • Abalone & Pearl Dragonfly Inlay
  • Fishman Presys + Bass Electronics & Fishman Sonicore Under Saddle Bridge Pickup
  • Rosewood MK Acoustic Bass Bridge & Bone Nut
  • Case Not Included

Get your Michael Kelly Dragonfly Fretless 5 5-String Acoustic-Electric Bass Guitar today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Ibanez SRMS805 5-String Bass Guitar Deep Twilight (FIREWORKS26) — $949.77
item.description:
$949.77 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

To the newcomer, the multi-scale concept may appear a bit unusual, but the biggest surprise may be how comfortable players become within a minute or two of playing the instrument. The different fret-to-bridge distances enhance tonality,  creating a better sounding bass. Previously, these instruments were only available from boutique bass builders, but now Ibanez is proud to introduce the  SRMS805: multi-scale bass at an affordable price.

The goal of the multi-scale system is to give the better tension of each string. The tension helps to create a more “alive”, open tone. On the SRMS805, the scale length is 34” on the G-string side, expanding to 35.5 at the low B.
Although the multi-scale neck can appear intimidating and unnatural, nothing could be further from the truth. When looking down at the neck from the players perspective, the exagerated fret layout seems to almost disappear and actually feels quite normal. The slant of the multi-scales ergonomically coordinate with the way a players hand angles as it moves up and down the neck, facilitating quick, comfortable playing action.

The SRMS805 is a quality instrument designed for the experienced, seasoned musician. Its Poplar burl / Mahogany body is attached to a 5pc Jatoba/Walnut SRMS5 neck with a Panga panga fretboard, Medium frets and custom multi-scale inlays. The Mono-Rail VS Bridge is the perfect match for a fan-fret instrument, allowing for independent positioning of each strings “mini-bridge” section to providing excellent intonation and superior string vibration transference. Electronics include Bartolini® BH1-5 pickups, for a full range warm punchy tone, and a 3-band EQ w/ Bypass switch and Mid-Frequency switch for complete sonic control. Case not included.

Get your Ibanez SRMS805 5-String Bass Guitar today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha BB734A Bass Guitar Dark Coffee Sunburst (FIREWORKS26) — $839.37
item.description:
$839.37 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

What always sets Yamaha apart from the rest is the love and care put into their instruments, along with affordability. The Yamaha BB734A bass guitar introduces modern appointments that give it the modern feel it has, which complements its vintage-style appointments. It also uses VSP7 and VSC7 Alnico V split single-coil pickups to give off its versatile sound as well. For bass players who enjoy a vintage look with a modern feel and enjoy playing a wide range of styles, this BB734A bass guitar is perfect for you.

Modern Appointments
Using a variety of wood, this Yamaha BB734A bass uses a 5-piece maple and mahogany bolt-on neck, with an alder and maple body as well. It uses a thinner neck profile than most bass guitars, which gives it much more playability and comfort. The woods used on this bass offer a great punch of character, allowing it to cut through any mix and pack a real strong punch with plenty of sustain.

Vintage-Style Appointments
With the use of vintage-style hardware, this BB734A offers a unique character. While it seems to cater to modern players, it still holds a very classy vibe. For the bridge, it uses a vintage plus steel-plated bridge with brass saddles for convertible stringing.

VSP7 and VSC7 Alnico V Split Single Coil Pickups
This BB734A features extremely versatile pickups, in a style where you have one pickup in the bridge and a split single coil in the neck. The active preamp has a 3-band EQ that will offer so much variety in tone than you already have with just the pickups alone. There is so much experimentation to be done when it comes to utilizing this unique bass.

Features:

  • Alder/Maple/Alder Body Construction
  • 34"-Scale 5-Piece Maple/Mahogany Neck
  • 10"-Radius, 21-Fret Rosewood Fingerboard
  • VSP7n Split Single Coil Alnico V/ VSC7b Single Coil Alnico V Pickups
  • Includes Gig Bag

Get your Yamaha BB734A Bass Guitar today at the guaranteed lowest price from Sam Ash with our 45-day return and 60-day price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha BB735 5-String Bass (Trans Black) (FIREWORKS26) — $885.37
item.description:
$885.37 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

Yamaha’s BB735 Bass features a contoured an Alder/Maple/Alder multi-laminated body construction. The hard maple center increases body stiffness and accentuates midrange to cut through the mix of a band, and allows a more uniform transmission of vibrations between the body and the maple neck for unparalleled resonance and sustain.
The bolt-on 34” scale 5-ply maple and mahogany laminated neck delivers a sharp attack, and quick response. This durable construction resists warping and twisting and adds the tight, penetrating character of maple combined with the warmth of mahogany to the instrument’s tone. Yamaha's 6-Bolt Miter Neck Joint holds the neck closer and tighter to the body fusing these two separate components into one. Compared to a conventional bolt-on joint, miter bolting offers more efficient transfer of string vibration throughout the body, for improved sustain and outstanding resonance that brings every note to life.

The BB735 5-String Bass is outfitted with Yamaha’s V7 Alnico pickups; with a split single-coil P style pickup, along with a single coil J style pickup in the bridge position. These pickups are tuned to deliver the classic BB vintage tone, slightly updated to provide a brighter sound that cuts through in live performance situations. A 3-Band Active EQ facilitates expands tonal versatility.

The BB735 is equipped with a Vintage Plus bridge that incorporates “Diagonal Body Thru Stringing,” in which the strings are angled at the saddle and pass through the instrument to the bridge at a 45º angle, as opposed to the traditional vertical stringing method which places more stress on the strings. Diagonal Body Thru Stringing significantly reduces this stress while transferring string vibration to the body reliably and efficiently. Light weight tuners offer a better balance and complement the overall feel. Case not included.

Get your Yamaha BB735 5-String Bass Guitar from Sam Ash Direct today with the security of our 45/60 day return/price protection policy.

item.title: Yamaha BB735 5-String Bass Guitar Dark Coffee (FIREWORKS26) — $885.37
item.description:
$885.37 · Mint · Sam Ash Music Direct

Yamaha’s BB735 Bass features a contoured an Alder/Maple/Alder multi-laminated body construction. The hard maple center increases body stiffness and accentuates midrange to cut through the mix of a band, and allows a more uniform transmission of vibrations between the body and the maple neck for unparalleled resonance and sustain.
The bolt-on 34” scale 5-ply maple and mahogany laminated neck delivers a sharp attack, and quick response. This durable construction resists warping and twisting and adds the tight, penetrating character of maple combined with the warmth of mahogany to the instrument’s tone. Yamaha's 6-Bolt Miter Neck Joint holds the neck closer and tighter to the body fusing these two separate components into one. Compared to a conventional bolt-on joint, miter bolting offers more efficient transfer of string vibration throughout the body, for improved sustain and outstanding resonance that brings every note to life.

The BB735 5-String Bass is outfitted with Yamaha’s V7 Alnico pickups; with a split single-coil P style pickup, along with a single coil J style pickup in the bridge position. These pickups are tuned to deliver the classic BB vintage tone, slightly updated to provide a brighter sound that cuts through in live performance situations. A 3-Band Active EQ facilitates expands tonal versatility.

The BB735 is equipped with a Vintage Plus bridge that incorporates “Diagonal Body Thru Stringing,” in which the strings are angled at the saddle and pass through the instrument to the bridge at a 45º angle, as opposed to the traditional vertical stringing method which places more stress on the strings. Diagonal Body Thru Stringing significantly reduces this stress while transferring string vibration to the body reliably and efficiently. Light weight tuners offer a better balance and complement the overall feel. Case not included.

Get your Yamaha BB735 5-String Bass Guitar from Sam Ash Direct today with the security of our 45/60 day return/price protection policy.
